steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student must describe Untitled (Topographic Landscape) to a new audience. The answer needs concrete details about the artwork itself — what it is, what it's made of, what it looks like — not Maya Lin's broader career.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — focuses on the Vietnam Veterans Memorial: Redirects attention to a different work entirely. ✗
  • Choice B — uses Untitled as a career example: Treats the artwork as a data point in Lin's biography rather than describing it. ✗
  • Choice C — vague description of the target artwork: Too general to help a new audience visualize it. ✗
  • Choice D — 1997 large-scale wood installation filling a gallery room: Gives date, medium, scale, and spatial impact — exactly the specifics a new audience needs. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
